title: Schema migration with online schema change tool
reasoning: pt-osc creates shadow table, copies, swaps via trigger.
feature_flag_strategy: Ship behind a reversible flag with owner, expiry date, cohort targeting, metrics, and an emergency disable path exercised before rollout.
solution: pt-online-schema-change --alter="ADD COLUMN x INT" --execute D=db,t=orders
what_breaks_naive_approach: ALTER on huge table: hours of locks.

title: Migrating from ad-hoc reports to dbt models
reasoning: dbt models = versioned SQL with tests + lineage.
feature_flag_strategy: Ship behind a reversible flag with owner, expiry date, cohort targeting, metrics, and an emergency disable path exercised before rollout.
solution:
-- models/orders_summary.sql
{{ config(materialized='table') }}
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS day, count(*), sum(total)
FROM {{ ref('raw_orders') }}
GROUP BY 1

-- tests/schema.yml
version: 2
models:
  - name: orders_summary
    columns:
      - name: day
        tests: [not_null, unique]

title: Replacing email service provider
migration_strategy: Phase 1: SES warmed up (low volume initially)
reasoning: Email reputation matters; warm-up gradually.
feature_flag_strategy: Per-email-type

title: Migrating from Postgres to CockroachDB
reasoning: CockroachDB ≈ PG-compatible but subtle differences (no stored procs, etc.).
feature_flag_strategy: Per-region
solution:
-- Migrating from Postgres to CockroachDB
-- Phase 1: add compatible structure without changing reads.
ALTER TABLE target_table ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS new_value TEXT;

-- Phase 2: backfill in bounded chunks with progress tracking.
UPDATE target_table
SET new_value = legacy_value
WHERE new_value IS NULL
  AND id IN (SELECT id FROM target_table WHERE new_value IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT 1000);

-- Phase 3: dual-read/dual-write in app code, compare counts, then cut over.
-- Phase 4: remove legacy path only after telemetry shows zero legacy reads for one full release window.

-- Rollback: keep legacy column/path until validation passes; disable new writes with a feature flag.

title: Refactor: from temporal coupling to explicit ordering

title: Migrating Postgres extensions

-- replace
